body:
margomayhem:

@cholerascum is watching Muppets rn and all I heard from the damn TV was Rita Moreno asking Kermit “oh Kermit, cant we just do it muppet style”

LIKE HUH?!?!😭😭

I feel like somehow it involves a whole hand being inserted…😮
